name: Waze
description: Community-driven GPS navigation app providing real-time traffic and routing, owned by Google.

years.notes: Original 2009–2012 hand-drawn doodle Wazer with sound waves, eyes, U-shaped smile and two wheels. Source asset is a non-square composed scene (455×326); the Wazer character is cropped and centered into the 24×24 viewBox. The yellow accent dot from the source scene is dropped to keep the icon focused on the Wazer mark.

Polished 2012–2020 Wazer mark (pre-Pentagram era). The source body uses a subtle radial gradient flattened to solid white for the brand icon; dark gray face, eyes, smile and wheels with lighter wheel hubs and tiny teal shadow ovals are preserved.

Pentagram redesign: simplified rounder speech-bubble Wazer with eyes, smile and two wheels. Source asset is a monochrome silhouette; minted in Waze's signature cyan (#05C8F7) with white eyes and smile as used on the app tile.

notes: 2009 source is intrinsically non-square (455×326) — Wazer character centered inside the 24×24 viewBox per svg.md §1.1. 2009 yellow accent dot from the source scene is intentionally dropped to focus on the Wazer mark. 2012 radial-gradient body flattened to solid white. 2020 raw is a pure monochrome silhouette; cyan is the documented Waze brand identity color.
